message.name: message1
message.title: Email warrant
message.text:
The sender of the threatening emails claims that our victim turned his or her daughter into a drug addict? That could be a strong motive.
I'll try to find out who the email sender is and ask for a warrant.

message.name: message2
message.title: Warrant granted
message.text:
The sender of the threatening emails is Terry McCoy. The warrant to search his place was granted, so make sure you pay him a visit.
Also, you should go back to the crime scene. Maybe you can find some more information about McCoy's daughter and the subpoena.

message.name: message3
message.title: Security access log
message.text:
The security access log from the clinic has arrived. It's waiting for you on the lab computer.
Also, I've asked Greg to pull up Melissa McCoy's tox screen. Ask him to show it to you when you're back here.

message.name: message4
message.title: Assistant involved?
message.text:
I wonder what Anna Steward was doing at the crime scene so late that evening.
Go and visit her while I'll be working on a warrant. I'll send her address to your locations.

message.name: message5
message.title: Bank account
message.text:
I'm glad Anna Steward at least provided a DNA sample.
In the meantime, I have been working on a warrant to look into the clinic's bank account. I get the feeling that money was involved in this case. Make sure you look into it on the lab computer when you're back.

message.name: message6
message.title: Pharmacist warrant
message.text:
This pharmacist becomes more and more suspicious. Thankfully, the judge agrees and has issued a warrant to search the pharmacy and to get a DNA sample.
Go and see what he has to hide.

message.name: message7
message.title: Tying up loose ends
message.text:
You've gathered enough evidence to wrap up the case.
Click the attachment to file your report. Russell
